emergency_triggers.evidence_required: OPERATOR_MANUAL: margin/NAV/broker-truth emergency is an alert and operator-review condition only; no automatic loss-side close or SL attach
emergency_triggers.thesis: operator-confirmed manual EUR_USD short; keep open and monitor read-only

harvest_triggers.evidence_required: OPERATOR_MANUAL: read-only monitoring/alerting is allowed; TP modification or profit action requires explicit operator authorization when auto_tp_modify_allowed=false
harvest_triggers.thesis: operator-confirmed manual EUR_USD short; keep open and monitor read-only

invalidation_triggers.evidence_required: OPERATOR_MANUAL: operator review only; do not automatically loss-close, attach SL, or treat red P/L as thesis invalidation
invalidation_triggers.thesis: operator-confirmed manual EUR_USD short; keep open and monitor read-only

entries.next_review_reason: open broker position requires guardian triggers

no_add_triggers.evidence_required: OPERATOR_MANUAL: do not add into the same pair/theme unless the operator explicitly authorizes overlap
no_add_triggers.thesis: operator-confirmed manual EUR_USD short; keep open and monitor read-only
